title: ononis subspicata var. broteroana
intro: Ononis subspicata var. broteroana, also known as broteroana spiny restharrow, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of broteroana spiny restharrow include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, capsules, or added to topical creams and ointments.
